name: Starflake
description: Eight-pointed quilt stars, each ray re-colouring as the block resettles on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: var(--color1); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(50% 0, 63% 37%, 100% 50%, 63% 63%, 50% 100%, 37% 63%, 0 50%, 37% 37%); clip-path: polygon(50% 0, 63% 37%, 100% 50%, 63% 63%, 50% 100%, 37% 63%, 0 50%, 37% 37%); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
